public interface IApiServerState

The IApiServerState type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
State
Top
Methods
  NameDescription
BeginRequest
Notifies the server about a new request being processed.
PrepareForUnavailableStateAsync
Puts the server into the PrepareUnavailable state. Once all in-flight requests have been processed, the server enters the Unavailable state.
